ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_insurance" TEXT /* Medical insurance information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., wearable, bedside monitor) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., ECG, pulse oximeter) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Calibration date of the device */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Maintenance date of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who the reading belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the reading */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the reading in seconds */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Heart rate reading */,
  "pulse" INTEGER /* Pulse reading */,
  "resp" INTEGER /* Respiration rate reading */,
  "spo2" INTEGER /* Oxygen saturation reading */,
  "signal_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the signal reading */,
  "data_loss" TEXT /* Data loss during transmission */,
  "transmission_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to transmit the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., arrhythmia detection, oxygen saturation trending) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the user */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who the notification belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., abnormal reading, device malfunction) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the configuration belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter of the device (e.g., sampling rate, sensitivity) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration */,
  "configuration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., arrhythmia detection, oxygen saturation trending) */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter of the analysis (e.g., threshold, window size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration */,
  "configuration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_configurations_analysis_type FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_type") REFERENCES analysis_results ("analysis_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_devices" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who the association belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the association belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the association */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the association */,
  "association_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_devices_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who the role belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
